title: KRAVAT - Speakeasy Bar
address: 10E0 St. 03, Phnom Penh 120208, Cambodia
description: A discreet speakeasy hidden behind a red door in the heart of Phnom Penh. Kravat offers an intimate, refined setting focused on well-balanced cocktails, quiet craftsmanship, and a relaxed atmosphere made for good conversations and good drinks. The bar is led by Nel, a respected Phnom Penh bartender, and has become a favorite spot for cocktail lovers in the city.

title: Sora Sky Bar - Rosewood Phnom Penh
address: Level 37, Rosewood Phnom Penh, Vattanac Capital Tower, 66 Monivong Boulevard, Sangkat Wat Phnom, Khan Daun Penh, Phnom Penh
open_hours: Open daily, 5:00 PM–12:00 AM. Last order at 11:45 PM
description: A sky-high cocktail bar perched on the 37th floor of Rosewood Phnom Penh, Sora offers one of the city’s most impressive skyline views. With its elegant indoor lounge, outdoor terrace, curated cocktails, and refined whisky library, it is a sophisticated place for sunset drinks, good conversations, and memorable nights above Phnom Penh.

title: Roodbar - Bassac Lane
address: #M47, Street 308, Bassac Lane, Phnom Penh, Cambodia
description: A lively cocktail bar in the heart of Bassac Lane, Roodbar is a relaxed Phnom Penh spot for distinctive cocktails, easy evenings, and good conversations. With a warm neighborhood feel and late-night energy, it is a place to enjoy creative drinks in one of the city’s most popular bar streets.

title: SROMOAL Cocktail Bar
address: #5, Samdach Louis Em Street 282, BKK1, Phnom Penh
description: A hidden Cambodia Golden Era-inspired bar in the heart of BKK1. Guests enter through a discreet hidden latch into a “liquid gallery” where local-twist cocktails, intimate atmosphere, and theatrical details create a memorable speakeasy experience. A refined place for good conversations, good drinks, and discovering Phnom Penh’s creative cocktail scene.

title: AURA Bar
address: 11B street 29, & Street 308, Phnom Penh 12301
description: Located on Bassac Lane in the heart of Phnom Penh, Aura is a rooftop venue that harmonizes modern elegance with a serene outdoor atmosphere. Known for its hidden gem status, Aura offers luxurious amenities and an exclusive dining experience featuring a charcoal oven. It is the perfect choice for exclusive gatherings and memorable events.

title: Casa Diego Bar
address: M34 St 308, Phnom Penh
description:
Casa Diego is a neighborhood gem of a micro restaurant-slash-tapas-bar, located at the intersection of vibrant bar Street 308 and the original bricked Bassac Lane. The cuisine Spanish and doesn't cut corners. Cold beer on tap and Spanish wines in the ice tubs are ready and waiting. Totally charming and cozy and you can watch cruise by all evening. It's a real buzzy place with local Cambodian and expat patrons stopping by regularly to meet and greet. It's great. Must pull yourself up to the bar and get a cold draft beer and some Iberian nibbles.

Up the winding staircase behind Casa Diego you'll find the well-kept secret of their cache cigar bar and lounge where patrons enjoy Cuban puros and rums and Negronis throughout the nights.

title: White Rabbit Bar
address: #16A Street 308, 12301 Sangkat Tonle Bassac, Phnom Penh
description: A small concept cocktail bar tucked away on Bassac Lane, White Rabbit invites guests to step into a moody, whimsical world inspired by Alice in Wonderland. With its intimate interior, theatrical details, creative cocktails, and playful atmosphere, it is a charming Phnom Penh spot for curious drinks, late-night conversations, and a little escape from the ordinary..

title: Samai Distillery Brand House, Bar & Shop
address: #9b, Street 830, Phnom Penh, Cambodia
open_hours:
Bar Nights: Thursday & Saturday, 6:30 PM–11:30 PM
Tours & Visits: Tuesday–Sunday, 12:00 PM–6:00 PM
Cocktail Classes: Tuesday–Saturday, 3PM
Shop: Tuesday–Sunday, 12:00 PM–6:00 PM
description:
Hidden behind the doors of Cambodia’s first premium rum distillery, Samai Distillery Bar is where Phnom Penh’s rum story begins. By day, the space is filled with barrels, copper stills, and the quiet rhythm of craft production; by night, it transforms into a lively rum bar where guests can drink Samai rums right where they are made.
Visitors can step inside the production space, discover the story behind Cambodia’s first locally crafted rum, and taste the full Samai portfolio — from smooth classics to bold local expressions. It is part distillery, part cocktail bar, and part Phnom Penh experience: a place where craftsmanship, Cambodian ingredients, music, and good conversations come together in every glass.
serves: 21 Points, Samai Daiquiri, Rum Coco, Scarlet Bloom, Kampot Negroni Noir

title: Lemongrass Bar - Apsara Resort
address: Coconut Beach, Koh Rong Island, Preah Sihanouk
description:
Set on the quiet shores of Coconut Beach, the bar at Apsara Resort offers a relaxed island escape surrounded by sea views, soft sand, and tropical calm. It is the kind of place to slow down with a cocktail after a beach day, enjoy the breeze by the water, and take in the easy rhythm of Koh Rong.
With its beachfront setting and resort atmosphere, Apsara Resort Bar is ideal for sunset drinks, relaxed evenings, and a more peaceful island experience away from the busier parts of Koh Rong.
serves: 21 Points, Rum Coco, Samai Daiquiri, Scarlet Bloom

title: YOU & Me Resort
address: Pagoda Beach, Koh Rong Island, Preah Sihanouk Province, Cambodia
description:
Set on the white sands of Pagoda Beach, You & Me Resort is a peaceful beachfront escape on Koh Rong Island. With ocean views, tropical gardens, two outdoor swimming pools, and a relaxed beachside restaurant and bar, it is a place made for slow afternoons, sunset drinks, and easy island evenings.
Surrounded by clear water and natural island beauty, the resort brings together comfort, simplicity, and a warm holiday atmosphere — perfect for guests looking to unwind by the sea, enjoy fresh food and cocktails, and experience the quieter side of Koh Rong.

title: YOU & Me Resorts
address: Pagoda Beach, Koh Rong Island, Preah Sihanouk Province, Cambodia
description:
Set on the calm shores of Pagoda Beach, The One Resort is a refined island retreat surrounded by white sand, clear water, and tropical greenery. With beachfront access, an outdoor pool, private beach area, restaurant, and bar, it offers a relaxed escape for guests looking to slow down and enjoy the quieter side of Koh Rong.
Designed for easy island days and peaceful evenings, the resort combines modern comfort with a natural beach atmosphere — a place for ocean views, fresh air, sunset drinks, and unhurried conversations by the sea.

title: Golden Beach Resort
address: Sok San Village, Koh Rong Island, Preah Sihanouk Province, Cambodia
open_hours:
Resort: Open daily
Restaurant: 11:00 AM–10:00 PM
Breakfast: 7:30 AM–10:30 AM
description:
Golden Beach Resort brings a soft touch of island luxury to the peaceful side of Koh Rong. Hidden in Sok San Village, it is a place where slow beach mornings, fresh seafood, spa rituals, and golden-hour cocktails become part of the same rhythm.
With sea-view rooms, tropical gardens, outdoor pools, wellness facilities, and easy access to island activities, the resort offers more than a stay — it feels like a complete island escape. Guests can move from the beach to the pool, from a quiet massage to dinner by the sea, and from daytime adventure to relaxed conversations over drinks.

title: Sabay Stay & Dine
address: Sok San Village, Koh Rong Island, Preah Sihanouk Province, Cambodia
open_hours:
Open Wednesday–Monday, 12:00 PM–9:00 PM
Closed on Tuesday
description:
Sabay brings a relaxed boho spirit to Sok San Village, mixing island comfort with fresh food, cocktails, and golden sunset moments. It is the kind of place where sandy feet are welcome, conversations stretch into the evening, and the mood feels easy, warm, and unpretentious.
With beachfront bungalows nearby, pet-friendly energy, and a menu focused on comforting international dishes, seafood, vegetarian and vegan options, Sabay feels like a small island home — casual, colorful, and made for slow Koh Rong days.

title: White Sand Ark Resort
address: Sok San Village, Sok San Beach, Koh Rong Island, Preah Sihanouk Province, Cambodia
description:
White Sand Ark is a quiet island hideaway with a soft, minimalist spirit and a calm rhythm of its own. Think pale sand, sea breeze, garden paths, simple comfort, and days that naturally move from morning swims to sunset drinks.
With modern bungalows, a relaxed restaurant and bar, and easy access to Sok San Beach, the resort feels made for guests who want Koh Rong at a slower pace — peaceful, warm, and close to nature, with just enough comfort to make the island feel like home.

title: BAR 43
address: 43 Alley West, Old Market, Krong Siem Reap, Cambodia
description:
Tucked away in a quiet alley just off Pub Street, Bar 43 is a refined cocktail hideaway in the heart of Siem Reap. Away from the noise of the main nightlife streets, it offers a more intimate atmosphere, creative cocktails, friendly service, and a relaxed space for good conversations and well-crafted drinks.
A favorite among cocktail lovers, Bar 43 brings together the energy of Siem Reap nights with a more polished, personal bar experience.

title: Laundry Bar
address: n° 7, Street 26 Siem Reap, 171204
description:
A true Siem Reap nightlife classic, Laundry Bar has been a home for music lovers since 2002. Set on Street 26, away from the louder rhythm of Pub Street, it brings together live bands, open mic nights, DJs, pool tables, and a relaxed crowd of locals, expats, artists, and travellers.
With its vintage atmosphere, easygoing charm, and late-night energy, Laundry Bar is a place to enjoy good drinks, good music, and the kind of conversations that stretch into the night.

title: INFUSION Bar
address: River Street, Krong Siem Reap, Cambodia
open_hours: Open Tuesday–Sunday, from 5:00 PM till late
description:
Set along Siem Reap’s riverside, Infusion Bar is a stylish cocktail lounge where local ingredients, craft mixology, and relaxed evening energy come together. Known for cocktails inspired by Cambodian flavors — from tamarind and pandan to kaffir lime, herbs, spices, and tropical fruits — it offers a fresh and creative take on the city’s bar scene.
With its cozy indoor space, alfresco setting, tapas menu, and warm atmosphere, Infusion Bar is a great place for sunset drinks, good conversations, and discovering Siem Reap through a more modern, locally rooted cocktail experience.

title: MADIRA Cigar & Cocktail House
address: Achar Sva Street, Siem Reap 171204, Cambodia
description:
Set by the Siem Reap riverside, Madira Indian Cocktail & Cigar House brings together Indian flavors, crafted cocktails, premium cigars, and the lively rhythm of Cambodia nights. Inspired by Indian mythology and rich Jodhpur-style aesthetics, the space feels warm, vibrant, and elegant — a place made for bold drinks, music, late-night stories, and relaxed conversations.
With its curated cocktails, cigar selection, and Indian-inspired bites, Madira offers a distinctive bar experience that blends spice, atmosphere, and modern Siem Reap energy.

title: The WILD Bar
address: Wat Damnak, Aleah Road, Krong Siem Reap 17000
open_hours: Wat Damnak, Aleah Road, Krong Siem Reap 17000
description:
Hidden just a short walk from Pub Street, WILD is a tropical garden escape where creative cocktails meet playful finger food. Known for its signature spring rolls and relaxed open-air atmosphere, it offers a refreshing break from the busy streets of Siem Reap.
With lush greenery, casual charm, and a menu made for sharing, WILD is a great spot for an easy lunch, a laid-back dinner, or evening drinks with friends.

title: The Living Room Bar – Park Hyatt Siem Reap
address: City, Sivutha Blvd, Krong Siem Reap 17252
description:
Set inside the elegant Park Hyatt Siem Reap, The Living Room Bar offers a refined escape in the heart of the city. With its Art Deco–Khmer design, intimate seating, and calm atmosphere, it is a sophisticated place to enjoy handcrafted cocktails after a day exploring Angkor or the streets of Siem Reap.
The bar features Khmer-inspired cocktails, classic drinks, wines, Champagne, and a curated selection of premium spirits. Quiet, stylish, and beautifully designed, The Living Room Bar is ideal for a relaxed evening drink, a polished hotel bar experience, or a more intimate night out.

title: Elephant Bar - Raffles Grand Hotel
address: Grand Lobby, Raffles Grand Hotel d’Angkor, 1 Vithei Charles de Gaulle, Khum Svay Dangkum, Siem Reap, Cambodia
description:
Set inside the historic Raffles Grand Hotel d’Angkor, Elephant Bar is one of Siem Reap’s most iconic cocktail destinations. With its timeless colonial elegance, warm lighting, and refined old-world atmosphere, the bar offers a sophisticated escape after a day of exploring Angkor.
Known for its heritage, classic service, and impressive whisky and bourbon collection, Elephant Bar is a place for elegant evenings, quiet conversations, and memorable drinks in one of Cambodia’s most legendary hotel bars.

title: D.WILKINS Cigar Lounge and Bar
address: 1st floor, M49, Street 308, inside Bassac Lane, Phnom Penh 120101
description: sdfsd
